title: LowOrderCheck
summary: Normalizes formal expressions and verifies the encoded raw P2 and P4 low-order identities.

mathematicalContent.heading: Mathematical role
mathematicalContent.body: Normalizes formal expressions and verifies the encoded raw P2 and P4 low-order identities.

mathematicalContent.heading: Formal boundary
mathematicalContent.body: This page describes exactly the declarations present in Juhlformula/Juhlcombinatorics/LowOrderCheck.lean; claims not represented by a declaration are not counted as verified.

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Definition: normalize Rat. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
Definition: normalize. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: def normalize : FormalExpr → FormalExpr | zero => zero | one => one | rat q => normalizeRat q | k => k | f => f | F m => F m

limitations: Verified means that Lean checks the propositions encoded in this file and their imported assumptions. It does not assert that the present formal statement exhausts every analytic hypothesis or convention in the cited literature.
